supply_chain.dependencies: Extensive network of over 65,000 retail pharmacies, home delivery, specialty and community health pharmacies. Dependence on pharmaceutical manufacturers for rebates and drug supply. Reliance on contracted network of physicians, hospitals and other health care professionals.
supply_chain.risks: Concentration risk with pharmaceutical manufacturers. Potential disruptions from pharmacy operations. Dependence on health care provider relationships. Risk of provider refusal to contract or demand for higher payments. Supply chain vulnerabilities in pharmaceutical distribution.

regulatory_risks: CMS regulations and audits on Medicare Advantage and Medicare Part D programs
Risk adjustment data validation (RADV) audits with potential retrospective payment adjustments
State insurance and HMO licensing and capital requirements
HIPAA privacy and security compliance requirements
HITECH data breach notification and enforcement
ERISA regulations for employer-sponsored health benefit plans
State Medicaid program regulations and rate adjustments
ACA medical loss ratio (MLR) requirements and rebates
Pharmacy Benefits Management (PBM) regulations at federal and state levels
DEA and state controlled substance regulations for pharmacies
State corporate practice of medicine and fee-splitting laws
Banking regulations for Optum Bank (FDIC requirements)
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance for international operations
State privacy and security regulations including data breach notification laws
Consumer protection laws (FTC, Telephone Consumer Protection Act)
Anti-kickback and false claims regulations
Antitrust regulations and enforcement actions
FDA regulations for pharmacy operations
State guaranty association laws for insurance obligations
Government contract regulations and conflict of interest restrictions
Tax law changes and unfavorable audit resolutions
Changes to ACA and potential modifications to healthcare legislation
Medicare Advantage benchmark reductions and funding pressures
State minimum MLR rebate requirements for Medicaid
Formulary and drug pricing regulations
Network adequacy and provider participation requirements
Quality star rating requirements for Medicare Advantage bonus payments
